Lyrics.text:
O! Mivonona re ianao,
Tsenao, Jeso.
Am-pifaliam-be (derao)
Ankalazao.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
(Faingana Ianao Jeso)
Faingana Ianao Jeso
(Jesosy, Mpanjaka),
Mpanavotra,
:,:Ho avy Ilay Mpanjakanao
tsenao!:,:
Isika no hihira hoe: Haleloia!

Tsy ho ela intsony
Ny fiavian' ny Tompo soa,
An-drahon-danitra (hobio)
Ankalazao.
